channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran's slain leader Khamenei laid in state in Tehran for week of mass funeral events
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Prepares for Week of Funeral Processions for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Iranians Begin To Gather For Khamenei Funeral Ceremonies
- Iranians begin to gather for Khamenei funeral ceremonies
- Iranians begin to gather for Khamenei funeral ceremonies
- Funeral events get underway for Iran's slain Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies for slain Supreme Leader Khamenei
- Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies for slain Supreme Leader Khamenei
- Iran prepares for weeklong funeral of late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in war
- Khamenei lies in state in Tehran as Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies
- Khamenei lies in state in Tehran as Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies
- Khamenei lies in state in Tehran as week-long funeral begin
- Iran begins funeral rites for Ali Khamenei, supreme leader killed in war
- Iran Begins Khamenei’s Funeral in Show of Defiance Against the U.S.
- Iran's Slain Leader Khamenei Laid In State In Tehran For Week Of Mass Funeral Events
- Khamenei lies in state in Tehran as Iran begins week of funeral ceremonies
- Iran prepares to bury slain supreme leader with week of mass mourning
- Iran: Dignitaries arrive for Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
- Iran Prepares to Bury Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Killed at Iran War’s Outset
- Khamenei’s coffin placed in Tehran religious complex as Iran begins days-long funeral
- Iran holds funeral for Ali Khamenei: Who is attending?
- Ali Khamenei’s six-day funeral expected to draw millions in Iran
- Khamenei funeral map: 7-day rites across Iran, Iraq
- Iran plans week of mass mourning for Khamenei’s funeral
- Khamenei’s coffin readied as Iran prepares for seven-day funeral
- Iran prepares to bury slain supreme leader with week of mass mourning]]>

- Putin’s ratings are dropping at their fastest pace since the full-scale war began]]>

item.title: Former Rosaviatsia Chief Charged With Fraud, Reports Say
item.description:

- Former Rosaviatsiya chief detained on fraud charges]]>

item.title: Death toll from massive strikes on Kyiv rises to 30
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Death toll from Russian attack on Kyiv rises to 30
- Death toll from Russian strike on Kyiv rises to 30
- Russia's deadliest strike on Kyiv this year kills at least 27 people]]>

item.title: Keiko Fujimori officially declared winner of Peru presidential race
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Conservative Keiko Fujimori wins knife-edge election in Peru
- Conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori wins Peru’s presidential election in a runoff
- Conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori wins Peru's presidential election in runoff
- Conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori wins Peru’s presidential election in a runoff
- Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru presidential race]]>
